overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective walking along the gravel shoulder of a mountainous highway. The scene features moderate vehicle traffic passing by on the asphalt road, rocky terrain on the right, and a starry night sky with distant illuminated structures visible ahead.

events.description: passing the Route 13 highway sign on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel shoulder of the highway

notable_agents.action: white box truck driving on the highway

entered.detail: highway sign indicating Route 13 and Interstate 1
steep rocky terrain with sparse vegetation
multi-lane asphalt highway with moving traffic
unpaved gravel shoulder alongside the highway
illuminated billboard structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the gravel shoulder of a mountain highway at night. The Route 13 highway sign is passed on the left while vehicles travel on the asphalt road. Rocky terrain rises on the right side and a distant illuminated structure is visible ahead under a starry sky.

events.description: large white tour bus passes by on the highway traveling in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as traffic passes

notable_agents.action: white tour bus driving past on the highway

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission towers and lines on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the highway shoulder as a large white bus passes by on the road. The Route 13 sign is now behind, and electrical transmission towers become visible on the right hillside. The distant illuminated structure appears slightly larger as the camera advances.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated billboard structure in the distance

notable_agents.action: dump truck traveling on the highway

segments.scene_description: The final stretch approaching the illuminated billboard structure ahead. The power lines on the right are now closer and more prominent, and various vehicles including trucks continue to pass on the highway. The rocky terrain remains consistent on both sides of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark mountain highway that gradually closes the distance toward a glowing distant structure. It begins by walking along a gravel shoulder past a Route 13 highway sign, with vehicles passing on the asphalt and rocky terrain rising to the right under a starry sky. As the camera advances and the sign falls behind, a large white bus passes by while electrical transmission towers emerge on the hillside. The scene then shifts as the power lines become more prominent and various trucks continue to stream past on the road. Finally, the camera approaches the illuminated billboard structure ahead, maintaining its path between the consistent rocky terrain of the mountain pass.
